pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; compilation or runtime failures occur due to internal API changes in JDK 17 (e.g., module encapsulation).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 17 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the updated Spring Boot version.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Set the Spring MVC path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to suppress deprecation warnings and ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x / Spring Framework 6.x which removed the default AntPathMatcher in favor of PathPatternParser.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (Java 17+) defaults to PathPatternParser; using the old default without explicit configuration causes deprecation warnings in Boot 2.7 and potential runtime errors or unexpected behavior in Boot 3 if code relies on AntPathMatcher semantics.
